text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the paddock before the Hyacinth<n>Stakes, Agnes
Digital is watching the<n>other Umamusume
intensely.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
choice_data_list: All right, keep your cleats on.
All right, keep your cleats on.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine today! I mean, I'm always<n>fine! I
wouldn't let myself lose<n>control.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But do you feel it, Trainer?<n>Something's weird
today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume are as darling as<n>ever... Wait.
Maybe that's it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Their presence is... even more radiant<n>than ever
today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Look at how serious everyone is<n>before the race.
It's to die for.<n>Although I get the feeling I
shouldn't<n>put it like that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's like... beneath their grace lies<n>something even
more pure...
choice_data_list: Something... you're hoping to feel firsthand?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nononononono! Don't be ridiculous! I<n>would never
be so presumptuous.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No. Today, I only wish to behold it—the<n>true
essence of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I won't get involved, of course. A<n>responsible
simp admires quietly and<n>without touching!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
However... I can admire them from a<n>better angle
than before—from as<n>close as I can get.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As always, she talks as if she's just<n>here to
spectate the race. But I can<n>tell by her eyes that
she's taking this<n>a little more seriously than usual.
